desc:
A port of the Merc. Ultima area by Casret.
It is mostly ported from a mostly finished port to Smaug.
The area starts down in room 55685 and uses zone 555 and 556.

   The area ranges through all levels.

   The two mazes (Desert and Whirlpool) may have to be adjusted.
The maze progs of 130 (Welcor's Mist Maze) are much better but
seemed a bit too strong for the area.

Edits made for tbaMUD by Parna.
name: Ultima Description Room

desc:
This is the main road of New Magincia.  To the south the dirt path continues
and a huge gate lies to the north.

exits.desc: A path leads to the south.

name: New Magincia Road

desc:
The path continues to the south and the north.  You see the tracks of sheep
here.

exits.desc: The path continues to the north.
There is a shimmering light to the south.

name: New Magincia Road

desc:
You see another moongate here, exactly between the crossing of two paths.
You can see dim shapes through it.

exits.desc: The path continues to the north.
Through the translucent moongate you think you see... books?

name: The New Magincia Moongate

desc:
The path continues to the south and north.  On the east there seems to be
administrative building.
name: New Magincia Road

desc:
The dirt road path ends here in a grove.  You can continue back to the north,
and there is an old abandoned house to the west.
name: New Magincia Road

desc:
These are the stables for the shepherd.  There are many fine horses here.
You can return to the barn to the south.

exits.desc: The front part of the barn is to the south.

name: Stables

desc:
This is your basic barn, with hay and stables to the north.  Something on the
floor seems to be attracting insects.

exits.desc: You hear neighing, intermixed with a strange talking.

name: Barn

desc:
This is an even smaller dirt path that crosses New Maginica Road.  To your
north there is a barn, and to the south you see a condemned building, though you
cannot enter this way.  West is blocked off a herd of sheep.

exits.desc: There is a shimmering light to the east.

name: Humility Lane

desc:
This place is wrecked, the rafters have fallen, and light shines through a
large hole in the roof.  You wonder what kinds of animals have taken home here.
name: Condemned House

desc:
As you walk into the house, you realize that this house must not have been
reconstructed yet from the ruin of Old Magincia.  Faint intimations of foolish
pride still can be seen through the wreckage.
name: Condemned House

desc:
The attic is dark, and you smell some vestiges of bat guano.  Is that the
sound of wings flapping?

exits.desc: The rest of the house is down.

name: Attic

desc:
This is a small humble house.  You do not see much here, though there are
some faint squeakings.

exits.desc: You see the faint outline of a trapdoor.

name: House

desc:
This is a very small path.  It ends here with a fence to the east.  To the
west is the Moongate, and to the north there is a small house.
name: Humility Lane

desc:
Though this room is small, it acts as a meeting place for Katrina and any
other person that she has to meet.  You can exit to the west or enter an office
to the south.
name: Entrance to the Office

desc:
This is office is very sparse...  And humble.  There are no decorations, in
fact the room is bare except for a simple desk and its chair.
name: Katrina's Office

desc:
This is an amazing HUGE library.  Its musty smell, and the collapsed
bookshelf to your north, tell you that it also must be ancient.  In any case,
you can't get out of the Library (remember the collapsed shelves?  ) so just
pick a book and start reading.  The stacks continue to the east and west.

extra_descs.desc:
These shelves deal with the fascinating letter A.  Among the more interesting
books are, "Andersen's tips on Area Building."  "The Art of Spamming" and "Axes
and You."

name: Library

desc:
The Library continues here, with exits to the east and west.  There should be
some interesting books here somewhere.

extra_descs.desc:
These books are about the letters B and C.  Some titles are: 'Boom Boxes: How
large will they become?'  And 'Cutlery: The fine points of Killing' and of course
the classic, 'Casret's Titles.'

name: Library

desc:
The Library continues here, with exits to the east and west.  There should be
some interesting books here somewhere.

extra_descs.desc:
This shelf has books dealing with the 'D's'.  'Dracula, Blood Sucker or
Beavis fan?'  Seems to be the most interesting book here.

name: Library

desc:
The Library continues here, with exits to the east and west.  There should be
some interesting books here somewhere.

extra_descs.desc:
The 'E' section is here.  One book, "Howard Stern" doesn't seem to belong
here.

name: Library

desc:
The Library continues here, with exits to the east and west.  There should be
some interesting books here somewhere.

exits.desc: You see a big desk and a man.

extra_descs.desc:
You find 'Fax Fun' and 'Farts: How to Blame it on the Dog.'  In this section of
the library.

name: Library

desc:
A big desk dominates this room.  All books must go through this office before
getting taken out.  Through this office, and through this man.
name: Library Office

desc:
The Library continues here, with exits to the east and west.  There should be
some interesting books here somewhere.

exits.desc: You see a huge desk and a man.

extra_descs.desc:
The books here start with 'G'.  'Grating Cheese with Julia Childs' and
'Garamond: What kind of font is this anyway?'  Lie here.

name: Library

desc:
The Library continues here, with exits to the east and west.  There should be
some interesting books here somewhere.

extra_descs.desc:
The books here comprise 'H' and 'I'.  'Hiya: The Women who Use it, and the
Men who Use the Women' and 'Icaza Loves Ya' are here in gaudy and annoying
covers.

name: Library

desc:
The Library continues here, with exits to the east and west.  There should be
some interesting books here somewhere.

extra_descs.desc:
These books start with the letter 'J'.  'Jokey Smurf's Greatest Explosions'
and 'The Judge takes on New York' seem to be the most popular books.

name: Library

desc:
The Library continues here, with exits to the east and west.  There should be
some interesting books here somewhere.

extra_descs.desc: Hmmm this is the 'K' section, and 'Kicking Vs.  Bashing' is here.

name: Library

desc:
The Library continues here, with exits to the east and west.  There should be
some interesting books here somewhere.

extra_descs.desc: A book titled, 'Lick me, Lick you' is here along with 'Libraries for Lovers'.

name: Library

desc:
The Library continues here, with exits to the east and west.  There should be
some interesting books here somewhere.

extra_descs.desc: 'Mahatma Teachs French' and 'MC Escher: The Rap Star and Paradoxical Artist'.

name: Library

desc:
A blue moongate is here, lighting up the storage room.  An empty shelf is
against the north wall, probably awaiting books.

exits.desc: Through the moongate, there is a party.

extra_descs.desc: The shelf looks a bit odd.  It's exactly the size of a door.

name: The Library Moongate

desc:
The Library continues here, with exits to the east and west.  There should be
some interesting books here somewhere.

extra_descs.desc: Hmmm...  This is the 'N' section...  But 'Nothing' seems to be here.

name: Library

desc:
The Library continues here, with exits to the east and west.  There should be
some interesting books here somewhere.

extra_descs.desc:
This is the 'OP' section.  You hear moaning behind those stacks and, yup,
there there on the floor there is another P.

name: Library

desc:
The Library continues here, with exits to the east and west.  There should be
some interesting books here somewhere.

extra_descs.desc:
'Quai Mackdaddy Monk' and 'Rhinoplasty, or The Inebriation of Wild Animals'
are here.

name: Library

desc:
The Library continues here, with exits to the east and west.  There should be
some interesting books here somewhere.

extra_descs.desc: 'Secret Door: The Shelf' is on the shelf.

The shelf to the south looks a bit strange.  It might be possible to open the
shelf.

name: Library

desc:
The Library continues here, with exits to the east and west.  There should be
some interesting books here somewhere.

extra_descs.desc: 'Textile Farming' and 'Tempting Miss Daisy' is here.

name: Library

desc:
The Library continues here, with exits to the east and west.  There should be
some interesting books here somewhere.

exits.desc: There is an odd chittering to the north.

extra_descs.desc: 'Ultima: The Building of an Area' and 'Vulva Void' are here.

name: Library

desc:
There is a Huge Web sitting here, stretching from shelf to shelf.  And stupid
you wandered into it.
name: Web

desc:
The Library continues here, with exits to the east and west.  There should be
some interesting books here somewhere.

exits.desc: There is a strange chittering noise to the south.

extra_descs.desc: "Yaz: Grooming Tips" is here.

name: Library

desc:
The moongate has opened inside of a huge party.  There are bards and other
townsmen.  This must be Britain.  There are people everywhere carrying their
drinks and singing is all around.  The party continues to the north, east, south
and west.
name: The Center of the Tavern

desc:
This is where the tavern entrance would be if it wasn't packed with humans
trying to get in or get out.  There is no chance of you leaving the tavern
tonight.  You can move to the part to the east and the south.
name: The Northwest Corner of the Tavern

desc:
Party-goers mingle here in front of the bar.  They seem to be having a great
time and wish for you to join them.  You can continue on to the south, east or
north.
name: The North Wall of the Tavern

desc:
Along this east wall of the tavern are all the tables for the meals.
Outside the windows you see cobblestone streets.
name: The Northeast corner of the Tavern

desc:
The band has set up here, against the west wall.  Many people dance to the
music.
name: The West Wall of the Tavern

desc:
The tables are set up here.  You see many couples and group just sitting and
talking.  They have drinks on their tables and smiles on their faces.
name: The East Wall of the Tavern

desc:
There are many people here, but even through their scent, there seems to be a
slight stench.
name: The Southwest Corner of the Tavern

desc:
The South Wall windows overlook the sea.  There seems to be a island far to
the south, and boats just floating in the ports.  The party-goers just wander
around here.
name: The South Wall of the Tavern

desc:
There are tables here that continue to the north.  The party-goers just
mingle and hit on each other.
name: The Southeast Corner of the Tavern

desc:
The stairway seems to lie down into the cellar.  It stinks of wine, beer and
snakes here.
name: Cellar

desc:
There are huge wine casks against this wall.  Most seem intact though one is
eaten through, and the inside seems to have a gooey green substance.

exits.desc: There is the sound of singing in that corner.
There is a shimmering light to the south.

name: Cellar

desc:
There is a chair in the corner and plenty of empty bottles.  There is also
the evidence of the green substance here as well.
name: Cellar

desc:
There is a slime trail here.  There seems to be much broken glass down here,
some if it covered with slime.

exits.desc: There is a shimmering to the east.

name: Cellar

desc:
The place around the moongate, as always, seems clean and neat.  The blue
light of the moongate has become a comforting sight to you.

exits.desc: Through the moongate there is a large courtroom.

name: The Britain Moongate

desc:
The walls are leaking here.  You hear the bang of feet and the shifting of
chairs from above.

exits.desc: There is a shimmering to the west.

name: Cellar

desc:
The damp walls of this corner bother you...  Not because it's damp.  Because
it's not water!
name: Cellar

desc:
The smells of this cellar are overpowering.  There doesn't seem to be much
ventilation.
name: Cellar

desc:
This corner of the cellar is the ugliest.  From the smell in the corner it is
obvious where the Drunks clear their guts.
name: Cellar

desc:
To the south you see a large courthouse and a small part of Yew.  Most of Yew
is secretly hidden in the branches of the forest.  To the north you see one of
the most dangerous parts of this same forest.
name: The Yew Entrance

desc:
The immense Courthouse faces this street.  All of Britania's crime comes here
to be tried.  There is little crime anymore though, after the great
enlightenment.  There is also a pub to the west.

exits.desc: You can see dim shapes behind the moongate.

name: In Front of the Courthouse

desc:
The cobblestone road leads into a clearing of the woods to the east and to a
pub to the west.  To your south you see a great Courthouse, but its entrance is
on the east.
name: Justice Row

desc:
You stand under a large stone arch.  To your east there is a bonfire.
Around the bonfire are these same stone arches; they form a circle around the
clearing.

exits.desc: There are chanting druids and a large bonfire to the east.

name: Under the Stone Arch

desc:
The heat from the bonfire warms you even at the fringe of the ceremony.
Here, Druids form a circle and chant the sacred mantra.
name: Bonfire

desc:
You are in a happy little pub.  There are many little tables and citizens are
talking here.
name: Pub

desc:
There are some citizens strolling along the road.  There is a Pub to the
west.
name: Justice Row

desc:
Perhaps the only real street in a city where all the citizens are nestled in
trees, it leads east to west.
name: Justice Row

desc:
This is where people would sit to see the cases and wait for the Judge.  To
the North you see the actual Bench.  All around are the pew-like seats.
name: The Audience Room

desc:
The Bench is one of the most imposing things you've seen.  You have to crane
your neck to even glimpse at the Judge.  There are no lawyers, there is only
Justice.  To the east and west are the prisons.
name: The Bench

desc:
To the north you see a cell.  Locks are unnecessary, because the prisoners
are kept in their cells by magic.

exits.desc: The prisoner looks at you and growls.

name: Prison

desc:
To the north you see a cell.  Locks are unnecessary, because the prisoners
are kept in their cells by magic.

exits.desc: The prisoner is a small man.

name: Prison

desc:
This is a cell where they keep dangerous prisoners.  You hope the magic
barriers don't give out.
name: Prison Cell

desc:
This is a cell where they keep dangerous prisoners.  You hope the magic
barriers don't give out.
name: Prison Cell

desc:
This is the Yew Forest.  The trees look all the same.  Consequently you are
lost.
name: Yew Forest

desc:
This is the Yew Forest.  The trees look all the same.  Consequently you are
lost.

exits.desc: You see the entrance to Yew.

name: Yew Forest

desc:
This is the Yew Forest.  The trees look all the same.  Consequently you are
lost.
name: Yew Forest

desc:
This is the Yew Forest.  The trees look all the same.  Consequently you are

name: Yew Forest

desc:
This is the Yew Forest.  The trees look all the same.  Consequently you are
lost.
name: Yew Forest

desc:
There is your way out, through the blue moongate.  You can see dimly through
it.

exits.desc: Through the moongate you see a cave opening.

name: The Yew Moongate

desc:
There is a huge maw of an entrance to one of the terrible Dungeons.  After
the Age of Enlightenment only 8 sources of evil still survive in the world.
These are the eight Dungeons.  Now they are being cleaned out.

exits.desc: A cold draft pours out of the dungeon.

name: Dungeon Entrance

desc:
These dungeon rooms seem all the same.  There are signs of recent battling
everywhere.
name: The Dungeon

desc:
These dungeon rooms seem all the same.  There are signs of recent battling
everywhere.
name: The Dungeon

desc:
These dungeon rooms seem all the same.  There are signs of recent battling
everywhere.

everywhere.
